items.prompt: Vintage melancholic vibe, phone camera style, super low resolution, close-up face shot, warm Japanese-style filter. The pic shows a super fair, slim, gorgeous cool-toned, girl with messy bun hair, curly bangs,some strands covering her eyes, wearing a light white fitted long-sleeve top, covered with a blanket, leaning back while holding a persian cat. Only her eyes are visible, with her hair naturally falling around. The whole scene has this dreamy, hazy feel. It's like a photo taken with just a regular iPhone, with a bit of motion blur, kinda messy composition, just a quick snap, like a candid shot you'd take without thinking.
